free_text: Molecular and cluster structures in O-18.
Tandem accelerator of the Meier
Leibnitz Laboratory of the  University and Technical
University in Munich
The C-12 targets had a thickness of 70 mug/cm**2 with
an enrichment of 98.9%. To determine contributions from
oxygen in the C-12C, a V(2)O(5) target of 69 mug/cm**2
an C-12 backing of 20 mug/cm**2 was used.
Only negligible contributions from oxygen < 1% and
C- 13 1.1% natural share were observed in the spectra.
The reaction products were analyzed with the
Munich Q3D spectrograph and then detected in a 1 m long
cathode strip focal plane detector.
.The outgoing protons were identified by the
focal plane detector using the energy loss in a
gas-filled chamber and the light output of a
scintillator behind.
.Shell model
.Table 9 of J,EPJ/A,43,17,2010
.The error is reported by authors.
.Level energy error.
